Mundane astrology: -AUTHOR”S NOTE
One of the celebrated areas of Indian astrology is the
mundane astrology. There are classical books in mundane
astrology but to my knowledge there is no modern book,
which helps any budding astrology student to predict the
events of mundane astrology in an easy manner. This book is
written to fill that void. Other motivating factor is some
of my students and well wishers wanted me to share these
knowledge, which will be helpful for other lovers of
astrology.
There have been many giants in the field of mundane
astrology like Dr.B.V.Raman and his illustrious daughter

Gayatri dev vasudev. MR.K.N.Rao of Delhi. These giants have
been my inspiration.
Many a time’s transits are used in mundane astrology to
explain the events .My approach has simple and staple
